message:
Command `
# 5h03m55s CPU / ~82m elapsed. All nominal. Monitor log stopped updating - monitor died.
# Restart monitor and do 6-hour sleep
nohup bash -c 'while true; do RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"; PID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk "{print \$2}" | head -1); [ -z "$PID" ] && echo "$(date): DIED" >> /tmp/drt_hourly.log && exit; RSS=$(grep VmRSS /proc/$PID/status 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$2}"); TIME=$(ps -p $PID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null); LINES=$(wc -l < "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null); FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo YES || echo no); echo "$(date): PID=$PID RSS=${RSS}kB CPU=$TIME Lines=$LINES Final=$FINAL" >> /tmp/drt_hourly.log; [ "$FINAL" = "YES" ] && exit; sleep 3600; done' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Monitor: $!"

sleep 21600
echo "=== 6h WAKE $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"; tail -80 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","RSS:"$6/1024"MB","TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD EXITED"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" || echo "Not done"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15
` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# 5h03m55s CPU / ~82m elapsed. All nominal. Monitor log stopped updating - monitor died.
# Restart monitor and do 6-hour sleep
nohup bash -c 'while true; do RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"; PID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk "{print \$2}" | head -1); [ -z "$PID" ] && echo "$(date): DIED" >> /tmp/drt_hourly.log && exit; RSS=$(grep VmRSS /proc/$PID/status 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$2}"); TIME=$(ps -p $PID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null); LINES=$(wc -l < "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null); FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo YES || echo no); echo "$(date): PID=$PID RSS=${RSS}kB CPU=$TIME Lines=$LINES Final=$FINAL" >> /tmp/drt_hourly.log; [ "$FINAL" = "YES" ] && exit; sleep 3600; done' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Monitor: $!"

sleep 21600
echo "=== 6h WAKE $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"; tail -80 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","RSS:"$6/1024"MB","TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD EXITED"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" || echo "Not done"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15
", "timeout": 21700}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "
# 5h03m55s CPU / ~82m elapsed. All nominal. Monitor log stopped updating - monitor died.
# Restart monitor and do 6-hour sleep
nohup bash -c 'while true; do RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"; PID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk "{print \$2}" | head -1); [ -z "$PID" ] && echo "$(date): DIED" >> /tmp/drt_hourly.log && exit; RSS=$(grep VmRSS /proc/$PID/status 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$2}"); TIME=$(ps -p $PID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null); LINES=$(wc -l < "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null); FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo YES || echo no); echo "$(date): PID=$PID RSS=${RSS}kB CPU=$TIME Lines=$LINES Final=$FINAL" >> /tmp/drt_hourly.log; [ "$FINAL" = "YES" ] && exit; sleep 3600; done' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Monitor: $!"

sleep 21600
echo "=== 6h WAKE $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"; tail -80 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","RSS:"$6/1024"MB","TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD EXITED"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" || echo "Not done"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15
" timed out
